mapper.sql: id, tenant_id, report_id, gene, chromosome, position, ref_allele, alt_allele, variant_type, zygosity, classification, hgvs_c, hgvs_p, evidence, source_type, created_at
mapper.select:
SELECT
FROM genetic_variant WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} ORDER BY id DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO genetic_variant ( tenant_id, report_id, gene, chromosome, position, ref_allele, alt_allele, variant_type, zygosity, classification, hgvs_c, hgvs_p, evidence, source_type ) VALUES ( #{tenantId}, #{reportId}, #{gene}, #{chromosome}, #{position}, #{refAllele}, #{altAllele}, #{variantType}, #{zygosity}, #{classification}, #{hgvsC}, #{hgvsP}, #{evidence}, #{sourceType} )
mapper.update: UPDATE genetic_variant SET report_id = #{reportId}, gene = #{gene}, chromosome = #{chromosome}, position = #{position}, ref_allele = #{refAllele}, alt_allele = #{altAllele}, variant_type = #{variantType}, zygosity = #{zygosity}, classification = #{classification}, hgvs_c = #{hgvsC}, hgvs_p = #{hgvsP}, evidence = #{evidence}, source_type = #{sourceType} WHERE tenant_id = #{tenantId} AND id = #{id}
